fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Graph mode keeps the workspace graph visible while ticket selection changes focus. 2. Focus changes pan or center the viewport instead of replacing the dataset with a new root-local graph. 3. Related edges and nearby nodes are emphasized while distant unrelated regions are de-emphasized.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Keep full workspace graph visible with focused navigation

fields.implementation_summary: Ticket-viewer graph mode now keeps a workspace-scoped graph mounted while selection changes retarget focus inside the existing dataset. A persistent graph root, shared selection-driven camera focus, and local node-context dimming let users move through nearby tickets without replacing the graph on each click.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Keep full workspace graph visible with focused navigation
fields.validation_summary: Passed cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus/Cargo.toml; viewer-ctl stop ticket-viewer && cd memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus && npm run test:e2e:release -- graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts.
